infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GoDaam uses the camera for proof-of-delivery (POD) photos, barcode scanning, and OCR.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GoDaam needs access to your photos to attach POD images from the gallery.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: GoDaam may save POD or delivery photos when your device requires it.

plugins.cameraPermission: GoDaam needs camera access to scan barcodes and read part labels (OCR).
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow GoDaam to record audio with video (optional).

plugins.photosPermission: GoDaam may access photos when attaching POD.
plugins.cameraPermission: GoDaam uses the camera for proof-of-delivery (POD) photos.
